title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist and Robin agent systems automate scientific discovery for medical research. They identify new treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss and other conditions by automating hypothesis generation, ranking, and consensus mechanisms across research tasks.
